arts.ttl: Chelsea v West Ham line-ups: Two Blues changes as Sanchez is dropped
arts.sum: Robert Sanchez has been dropped from the Chelsea side for tonight’s London derby at Stamford Bridge. With keeper Sanchez having made a number of errors this season, Filip Jorgensen has been brought in in his place. It is one of two changes to the Chelsea starting line-up – the other sees Tosin Adarabioyo come in […] The post Chelsea v West Ham line-ups: Two Blues changes as Sanchez is dropped appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Chilwell set for Crystal Palace loan
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell is set to join Premier League rivals Crystal Palace on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v West Ham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute updates from the 8pm kick-off You can email John with your thoughts Big news there: Robert Sanchez dropped for Filip Jorgensen in the Chelsea goal. Christopher Nkunku is on the bench despite all the transfer speculation. Tosin in for Chalobah. Three at the back for the Hammers, Max Kilman as the sole centre=half by trade. Andy Irving, a regular sub, something of a mystery, gets his first ever start. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Joao Felix made a big prediction about his Chelsea future four months ago, he was totally wrong - opinion
Bowen returns and Irving makes full debut at Chelsea
arts.sum: Alongside Mavropanos will be goalkeepers Łukasz Fabiański and Wes Foderingham, Academy of Football graduate trio Kaelan Casey, Ollie Scarles and Lewis Orford, midfielders Guido Rodríguez and Luis Guilherme and forward Danny Ings. West Ham United: Areola, Wan-Bissaka, Coufal, Kilman, Cresswell, Emerson, Rodríguez, Souček, Soler, Kudus, Bowen ©
